startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: AliExpress product (/item/) or seller (/store/) page URLs to screenshot.

mode.title: Mode
enumTitles: Product (US residential proxy + fingerprint, rotate on block)
Seller (real IP, no fingerprint, solve captcha via 2captcha)
mode.description: Which browser strategy to use. Product mode avoids and rotates on blocks; seller mode solves captchas in place via 2captcha.

format.title: Screenshot Format
format.description: Output image format. JPEG is captured at quality 85.

fullPage.title: Full Page Screenshot
fullPage.description: Capture the entire scrollable page (lazy-loads images first) instead of just the viewport.

twoCaptchaApiKey.title: 2captcha API Key
twoCaptchaApiKey.description: Seller mode only. Falls back to TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY env var.
